steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The logical relationship is cause-effect. The 2023 measurements revealed a concerning rotation (cause), and the blank needs a transition signaling that closing the area around the tower was the direct consequence.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — "In comparison": signals that two things are being compared side by side. No second comparable case is introduced here. ✗
  • Choice B — "As a result": signals that the closure is a direct consequence of the concerning rotation discovered by measurements, so fits. ✓
  • Choice C — "For example": signals exemplification. The closure would have to be a specific instance of a general pattern, but no such pattern is stated. ✗
  • Choice D — "Similarly": signals that two situations share a parallel. The closure is not a parallel to the rotation — it is the response to it. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
